caption: The video presents a slideshow presentation about housing trusts. The initial scene displays a white slide with text organized into two sections. Under "Trustees" and "MGL Chapter 44, Section 55c," bullet points state "Minimum five," "Includes CEO," "Appointed by Mayor/CC/SB," "Two-year terms," and "'Public agents'." Beside this, under "Board Powers" and "MGL Chapter 44, Section 55c," it notes "16 explicit powers including:" followed by bullets regarding accepting, purchasing, and selling real or personal property. Small video feeds of presenters appear at the top. The scene then transitions to a slide titled "Trust annual reporting to CPC," which features the text, "Housing trusts must track CPA funds separately and annually report to CPC to account for funds in CP-3 report to DOR," alongside an image of a formal document. The final frames maintain this reporting slide, with the MHP logo visible in the corners.
